recommendations.rationale: Cleanest way to monitor improving tech appetite, but the move is still early and not confirmed above the medium-term trend.
evidence: Closed at 4.814, up 1.347% on the day
Regime remains range with 60-day range position 0.2164
risks: Move may still be a range bounce rather than a durable trend change
Volume ratio 0.7338 is below average and not decisive
Recent posterior miss on an avoid call here shows rebound risk is real
recommendations.invalidation: Downgrade if price loses the 20-day MA and closes back into the lower range; upgrade only if it sustains above the 20-day MA and begins reclaiming the 60-day MA.

recommendations.rationale: Confirms that tech strength was broader than a single ETF, but medium-term trend repair is still incomplete.

risks: Can still be a rebound inside a weak medium-term structure
Recent posterior review showed prior avoid calls here were too defensive

recommendations.rationale: Strongest single-stock move in the snapshot, but still too early to chase because it remains well below the 60-day trend despite better ETF confirmation.
evidence: Closed at 128.6, up 3.293% on the day
Theme confirmation improved because both 3033.HK and 3067.HK also closed above their 20-day MAs
risks: Move may be headline-driven without durable follow-through
Still far below the 60-day MA, so trend repair is incomplete
Posterior pass rate remains modest, arguing against aggressive upgrading
recommendations.invalidation: The setup weakens if it loses the 20-day MA; it becomes more credible only if ETF strength persists and the stock keeps building above the 20-day MA toward the 60-day MA.

recommendations.rationale: Steadiest broad-market posture in the list, offering base-case exposure without relying on an unconfirmed tech breakout.
evidence: Closed at 26.24, up 0.153% on the day
Recent posterior evaluation of a prior hold call was pass at T+3 and mixed at T+10
risks: Momentum is limited, with volume ratio only 0.4815
Still below the 60-day MA, so this is stability rather than breakout
If tech strength fades quickly, broad-market support may also stall
recommendations.invalidation: Reassess if price loses the 20-day MA; conviction improves only if it reclaims the 60-day MA with stronger participation.
